name: california-fresno
description: Fresno County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Fresno County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Fresno County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Fresno County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Fresno County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Fresno County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-fresno-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-fresno-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page uses a standard ASP.NET WebForms structure with hidden viewstate fields, indicating the main content is likely inside a container div or table below the form inputs.
Supervisor data is likely contained within <tr> elements of a <table> or <div class='list'> elements containing <a> tags for detail links.
Photo URLs are likely found in tags with 'src' attributes that may be relative paths requiring absolutization.
The 'detailUrl' can be extracted from the 'href' attribute of the anchor tag wrapping the supervisor's name.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Fresno County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Fresno County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Fresno County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Fresno County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
